title: Communications - How Do I?
description:
Communications - How Do I?

Communications - How Do I....?

How do I communicate from the controller using RS-232C?

The RC700 has the capability of communicating with RS-232C with up to eight ports (4 per card).

To use RS-232C communications:

	Add one or two RS-232C option boards to the
	 controller.
	Configure the ports using Epson RC+ (see
	 RS-232C Software Configuration)
	 or by using the SetCom statement in your
	 programs or from the command window.
	Write code in your SPEL+ application to communicate
	 with external devices.

See RS-232C Communications for more details.

How do I communicate from the controller using TCP/IP?

The RC700 has the capability of communicating with TCP/IP with eight ports.

To use TCP/IP communications:

	Configure the ports using Epson RC+ (see
	 TCP/IP Software Configuration)
	 or by using the SetNet statement in your
	 programs or from the command window.
	Write code in your SPEL+ application to communicate
	 with external devices.

See TCP/IP Communications for more details.
